headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com; media-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
